name: Alexander Technique
tagline: Stripped-down, banging techno for peak-time hours.

labels.name: Data Distortion
labels.note: Independent imprint for his own raw, futuristic techno.

accolade: Recent EP peaked at #5 on the Beatport Techno Top 100.

bio.short: NYC techno DJ, producer & label owner — raw, stripped, peak-time techno, supported by Carl Cox, Adam Beyer & Kevin Saunderson.
bio.medium: Alexander Technique is a New York City techno DJ, producer and remixer with two decades in the underground. Co-founder of Terminator Records with Todd Terry and founder of Data Distortion, his raw, groove-driven productions draw support from Carl Cox, Adam Beyer, Kevin Saunderson, The Blessed Madonna and more.
bio.long:
Alexander Technique is a NYC-rooted DJ, producer, and remixer known for raw, banging techno and a stripped, uncompromising underground sound. Emerging from the tri-state scene in the late '90s, he built his reputation through relentless DJ sets, deep record knowledge, and groove-driven productions designed for real rooms and late hours.

With a career spanning more than two decades, he has collaborated with artists including Todd Terry, Felix Da Housecat and Roland Clark, evolving from house roots into a darker, more raw techno direction while maintaining true underground credibility.

His productions have earned support from Carl Cox, Adam Beyer, Chris Liebing, Nicole Moudaber, Maceo Plex, Kevin Saunderson, Josh Wink, and The Blessed Madonna, regularly appearing in DJ sets across global club circuits.

In 2026 he launched Data Distortion, an independent imprint dedicated to releasing his own raw, futuristic techno — focused on tension, groove, and a no-compromise aesthetic.

bioSourceNote: Long bio is verbatim from the artist's official SoundCloud profile.
